market_pulse.one_liner: Equities rally on easing trade fears and strong jobs data, but Ukraine escalation and AI rotation risks keep sentiment mixed.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Rotation out of overbought tech into energy and safe havens as AI bubble concerns mount; Canadian financials show overbought signals.

held_position_review.rationale: U.S. becoming top oil exporter and CME 24/7 crude trading are structural bullish catalysts; current dip offers entry ahead of energy rotation.
Massive $4.8M call flow at $190 strike signals institutional conviction; safe-haven demand supports healthcare in market rotation.

opportunities.thesis: Unusual call flow (224x vol/OI, $5.4M premium) points to smart money positioning for tech rebound; AI narrative still intact despite rotation fears.
opportunities.catalyst: Positive earnings surprise or AI product news within 2 weeks.

opportunities.thesis: Extraordinary put buying (2270x vol/OI at $305, $11.6M premium) signals major downside bet; consumer spending concerns and rotation out of mega-cap tech.
opportunities.catalyst: Disappointing Prime Day preview or broader market rotation accelerating.

risk_alerts.alert: Ukraine strikes on cargo ships and Putin's rejection of talks escalate geopolitical risk, potentially spiking oil prices and disrupting supply chains.
Market rotation out of AI/tech could accelerate, hitting MSFT and AMZN positions; VIX at 18.6 may underprice tail risk.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Escalation risk raises energy prices and safe-haven demand, directly impacting XLE and JNJ.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Attacks on shipping could disrupt grain and energy exports, boosting oil and defense stocks.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
geopolitical_impact.rationale: No direct market impact; isolated space station incident.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Domestic French political issue, minimal effect on global markets.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Humanitarian tragedy with no financial market implications.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Iran footballers issued US visas for World Cup, says White House
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Sports diplomacy has limited market effect, though signals slight thaw in US-Iran relations.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Zelenskyy: Putin choosing war by rejecting offer for in-person talks
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Reinforces conflict stalemate, sustaining geopolitical risk premium in energy markets.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Trump hails jobs surge, says Iran talks ‘going well’
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Positive on US economy, potential de-escalation with Iran could lower oil prices, mixed for XLE.

immediate: Add to JNJ position on bullish options flow and safe-haven rotation.
Hold XLE with stop at $56.00; add on confirmation above $58.00.
